title: Cherry Bubblegum
description: Sweep this cherry-flavoured Valentine's Day lip oil on for an instant hit of hydration or layer over your favourite lippie for a slick of gloss.
ingredients: Ricinus Communis Seed Oil (Organic Castor Oil)
Simmondsia Chinensis Seed Oil (Organic Jojoba Oil)
Prunus Amygdalus Amara Kernel Oil (Almond Essential Oil)
Prunus Avium Seed Oil (Cherry Kernel Oil)

images.alt: Cherry Bubblegum. A neatly smeared swatch of deep terra cotta-coloured solid lip oil.

A black tube of Lush "Cherry Bubblegum" lip oil sits open on a pink podium. The reddish-pink product is visible at the top, with its cap resting beside it against a pink curtain featuring a heart-shaped spotlight.

A person wearing strawberry-patterned pyjamas smiles while applying a reddish-pink Lush "Cherry Bubblegum" solid lip oil to their bottom lip. They are reclining on a patterned bedspread in a warm, dimly lit room.

A person with dark skin holds a small, round, pink compact mirror, reflecting their lips as they apply the Lush "Cherry Bubblegum" lip oil. The background shows a soft beige carpet and a hint of a pink wall.

A person with long, dark braids lies on a patterned bedspread, looking into a small pink hand mirror while applying a black tube of Cherry Bubblegum solid lip oil. They are wearing light blue pyjamas with a pink strawberry pattern.
